title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: App.java implements POST /books with Book object creation; BooksApiTest.java:60-71 tests creation

title: GET /books with optional author filter
evidence: App.java implements GET /books with optional author query param; BooksApiTest.java:81-96 tests filtering

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: App.java implements GET /books/{id}; BooksApiTest.java:68-70 tests retrieval

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: App.java implements PUT /books/{id}; BooksApiTest.java:87-90 tests update

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: App.java implements DELETE /books/{id}; BooksApiTest.java:98-99 tests deletion

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: pom.xml includes sqlite-jdbc; BookRepository.java implements SQLite persistence

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: App.java uses Javalin with appropriate HttpStatus (200, 201, 400, 404, 204) codes

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: App.java validates title and author non-empty; BooksApiTest.java:74-78 tests validation failure

title: GET /health endpoint
evidence: App.java implements GET /health; BooksApiTest.java:53-57 verifies endpoint

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: BooksApiTest.java contains 5 tests: health, create+get, validation, update+delete+filter, not-found
